articles.title: E20 fuel may damage rubber parts in E10 cars, said unpublished report
articles.summary: An ARAI report noted rubber part deterioration in E10 vehicles using E20 fuel. Metallic components showed no adverse impact, and emissions remained within legislative limits.

articles.title: Stock market opens in green as Sensex jumps over 80 points, Nifty50 trades above 24,470
articles.summary: Stock market today: Top shares to buy on July 7 Indian equity markets are expected to open on a strong positive note, with Gift Nifty trading at 24,580, up by 88 points, indicating a firm start for the session. Global sentiment remains supportive as Asia-Pacific equities extended their upward momentum, tracking last week's gains on Wall Street and sustained risk-on sentiment among investors.

articles.title: Mumbai schools remain closed today 7 July 2026 as BMC extends holiday amid heavy rainfall
articles.summary: Mumbai schools and colleges remain closed on July 7, 2026, after the Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation (BMC) extended the holiday due to heavy rainfall and an orange alert issued by the India Meteorological Department (IMD). Educational institutions across Mumbai, including government, private and civic-run schools, have been shut as a precautionary measure.

articles.title: CCI Recruitment 2026 notification released for 148 posts; applications begin July 9
articles.summary: The Cotton Corporation of India (CCI) has released the Recruitment 2026 notification for 148 vacancies across Assistant Manager, Management Trainee, Junior Commercial Executive and Junior Assistant posts. Online applications will be accepted from July 9 to July 24, 2026, through the official website.

articles.title: Nagaland University opens FYUGP B.Sc. Honours admissions through CUET UG 2026
articles.summary: Nagaland University has opened admissions for its Four-Year Undergraduate Programme (FYUGP) in B.Sc. Honours and Honours with Research for the 2026–27 academic session through CUET-UG 2026.
